Host-wrapped switch component.

# Import

```ts
import { Switch } from "@dartwic/interface-sdk/ui";
```

# Accepted Props

| Prop | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `checked` | `boolean` | Controlled checked state. |
| `defaultChecked` | `boolean` | Uncontrolled checked state. |
| `onCheckedChange` | `function` | Change handler. |
| `disabled` | `boolean` | Disable interaction. |
| `className` | `string` | Extra classes. |

# Source

- Public host component exposed through `@dartwic/interface-sdk/ui`.
